title: Shadowed Cycle 11 readiness audit: current legacy seen-state references
body: Shadowed Glimmering Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d read-only tidy-plan support. Cycle 11 pre-check today found 98 files in .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen. Current non-test references to account for before deletion: .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md lines 159 and 178-186 and fallback around 200, .agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md, agent-tools/README.md lines 274 and 348, .agent/rules/continuity-surface-commits-as-orphans.md line 12, and docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/182-mid-cycle-handoff-record-substrate.md line 35. The ADR-182 reference is not named in Cycle 11 scope and should receive a deliberate keep/update verdict before any zero-grep deletion claim. No source edits from Shadowed beyond napkin capture, no commit intent.
